name: Bayview Golf Center
about: Bayview Golf Center is a dedicated golf simulator venue offering a tech-driven experience for golfers of all skill levels. The facility features multiple simulator bays equipped with advanced technology to provide realistic golf simulations and practice opportunities. Pricing is structured on an hourly basis per bay, making it accessible for both individual sessions and group outings. The venue combines golf technology with a social atmosphere, featuring a full bar and food options to enhance the overall experience for casual players, serious golfers, and groups seeking entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulator technology with accurate ball and club tracking
Full bar and food options available on-site
Flexible booking for both individuals and groups
Private rooms available for events and parties

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with food options

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site if you don't have your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the venue has a full kitchen and bar available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 1.5 to 2 hours per bay, depending on simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is accessible to families, though specific kid-friendly amenities or policies are not detailed.
